Package me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config

Class ConfigManager

java.lang.Object
me.itzloghotxd.pdk.config.ConfigManager
public class ConfigManager extends Object
Manages multiple configuration files by mapping them to an String config. This class provides utility functions to save, reload, and retrieve configurations efficiently.
Since:
0.0.2
Author:
ItzLoghotXD

  • Constructor Details

    • ConfigManager

      public ConfigManager(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin plugin)
      Constructs a new ConfigManager.
      Parameters:
      plugin - The plugin instance using this manager

  • Method Details

    • save

      public void save()
      Saves all registered configuration files.

    • save

      public void save(String... configs)
      Saves a specific configuration file.
      Parameters:
      configs - The String key associated with the configuration file.

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Reloads all registered configuration files.

    • reload

      public void reload(String... configs)
      Reloads a specific configuration file.
      Parameters:
      configs - The String key associated with the configuration file.

    • get

      public ConfigHandler get(@NotNull @NotNull String config)
      Retrieves a registered configuration file by its associated String config.
      Parameters:
      config - The String key associated with the configuration file.
      Returns:
      The corresponding ConfigHandler instance.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the configuration file is not registered.

    • register

      public void register(ConfigHandler... configs)
      Registers a configuration file in the manager. And then, Saves the default configuration files if it does not already exist.
      Parameters:
      configs - The ConfigHandler instance to associate with the given key.

    • has

      public boolean has(String config)
      Checks if a configuration file is registered.
      Parameters:
      config - The String key associated with the configuration file.
      Returns:
      True if the configuration file is registered, false otherwise.

    • getConfig

      public org.bukkit.configuration.file.FileConfiguration getConfig(String config)
      Retrieves the FileConfiguration associated with a registered configuration file.
      Parameters:
      config - The String key associated with the configuration file.
      Returns:
      The FileConfiguration instance.
